body: Run this after memory files change so local keyword and semantic retrieval reflect canonical Markdown memory.

evidence.text: brick rebuild regenerates the local SQLite index from canonical Markdown memory.

fields.expected_output: The command reports an ok status or a readable rebuild summary.
fields.failure_notes: Fix invalid or blocked memory files before rebuilding again.
fields.when_to_use: After adding, editing, merging, or deleting Brick memory files.

title: Rebuild Brick memory index
